title: Lineage as Fate
html:
The recurring Yahir-thought that family patterns repeat across generations — first articulated literarily through García Márquez's Buendía family (2022 03 11 one hundred years of solitude reading log), but functionally driving most of the dad-related writing across the 2019–2026 corpus. Not fatalism — Yahir treats lineage as both prison (the cycle) and axle (the determination required to break it).

TL;DR

  • 38 inbound links — among the densest "philosophical" stubs in the vault.
  • Origin: One Hundred Years of Solitude. Buendía men repeating names and traits + Melquíades' pre-written manuscript = lineage as both literal text and existential trap.
  • Operationalized through the 2019 dad-death cluster (2019 08 25 my dad dead augusta 24th, 2019 12 22 dad dies it crashes tonight, 2019 08 26 dream of dads key, 2019 10 27 car crash with dad premonition) — premonition / dread of becoming the father.
  • Surfaces explicitly in the 2025–2026 wedding/family planning (2025 06 22 wedding list for now, 2025 07 26 thoughts and things 7 25 2025) and the Stranger in a BIG scary new wrld essay.
  • Counterweight to debt of gratitude: the lineage you inherit vs the lineage you choose to honor.

Key themes

Names recur. Yahir is interested in the literal mechanic — 2023 07 23 names, 2023 07 23 names and kid conditions — what naming a child does to shape who they become.

The father is the mirror. narcissist father as mirror is a sibling concept. The dad isn't just past — he's a mirror into Yahir's potential future. 2019 10 31 maya on where father went wrong, 2019 10 31 before i forget i ask maya where my father went wrong she re are the Maya-as-oracle moments where Yahir explicitly tries to extract the failure-mode.

Premonition as inheritance. dad death premonitions — Yahir dreamt his father's death repeatedly before it happened (2019 08 26 dream of dads key, 2019 10 27 car crash with dad premonition). The "fate" in lineage-as-fate has a magical-realist edge — not coincidence.

Alcoholism is the explicit cycle. alcoholism in the family, dad's 4th DUI — the literal repeating mechanism Yahir is most determined to break.

Buy-mom-a-house is the answer. 2022 09 23 buy mom a house is the literal counter-move — converting debt of gratitude into an asset that breaks the housing-instability lineage.

Chronological arc

  • 2019 — Dad-death and aftermath dominates (2019 08 25 my dad dead augusta 24th, 2019 09 09 two parts of the same thing gone, 2019 10 16 shits fucked). Maya as oracle (2019 10 31 maya on where father went wrong).
  • 2020 — Quiet integration (2020 03 07 papi).
  • 2021–2022 — The literary/philosophical articulation (2022 03 11 one hundred years of solitude reading log is the named-concept moment).
  • 2023 — Naming-as-fate (2023 07 23 names, 2023 07 23 names and kid conditions).
  • 2024–2025 — Activation: dad's 4th DUI forces the question into the present (2024 05 08 biggest lesson, 2024 05 08 a); wedding planning brings choice-of-lineage forward (2025 06 22 wedding list for now).
  • 2026 — Synthesis: founder loneliness 2022 2026 and family as hidden runway both pull this thread.

Source summaries

Most-impactful (10 of 27):

  • 2022 03 11 one hundred years of solitude reading log — origin
  • 2019 08 25 my dad dead augusta 24th — the precipitating event
  • 2019 10 31 maya on where father went wrong — the diagnostic
  • 2019 12 22 dad dies it crashes tonight
  • 2019 08 26 dream of dads key
  • 2023 07 23 names and kid conditions
  • 2025 10 04 stranger in a big scary new wrld
  • 2025 07 26 thoughts and things 7 25 2025
  • 2025 06 22 wedding list for now
  • 2024 05 08 biggest lesson

Plus ~17 more dad-cluster + family-naming summaries.

Connections

  • narcissist father as mirror · dad death premonitions · alcoholism in the family · dad wisdom — sibling concepts
  • magical realism — the literary frame
  • the other wes moore — the same-name-different-fate book that informs this thinking
  • gtanos · emilio · dad yahir · yahir family — entities in the lineage
  • debt of gratitude — the counter-frame (chosen lineage)
  • family as hidden runway (synthesis) — how the lineage actually scaffolded
  • cyclical time — adjacent literary frame
